verses.1: A Psalm of Solomon. Give the king Your judgments, God, And Your righteousness to the king’s son.
verses.2: May he judge Your people with righteousness And Your afflicted with justice.
verses.3: May the mountains bring peace to the people, And the hills, in righteousness.
verses.4: May he vindicate the afflicted of the people, Save the children of the needy, And crush the oppressor.
verses.5: May they fear You while the sun shines, And as long as the moon shines, throughout all generations.
verses.6: May he come down like rain upon the mown grass, Like showers that water the earth.
verses.7: May the righteous flourish in his days, As well as an abundance of peace, until the moon is no more.
verses.8: May he also rule from sea to sea, And from the Euphrates River to the ends of the earth.
verses.9: May the nomads of the desert bow before him, And his enemies lick the dust.
verses.10: May the kings of Tarshish and of the islands bring gifts; May the kings of Sheba and Seba offer tributes.
verses.11: And may all kings bow down before him, All nations serve him.
verses.12: For he will save the needy when he cries for help, The afflicted also, and him who has no helper.
verses.13: He will have compassion on the poor and needy, And he will save the lives of the needy.
verses.14: He will rescue their life from oppression and violence, And their blood will be precious in his sight;
verses.15: So may he live, and may the gold of Sheba be given to him; And they are to pray for him continually; They are to bless him all day long.
verses.16: May there be abundance of grain on the earth on top of the mountains; Its fruit will wave like the cedars of Lebanon; And may those from the city flourish like the vegetation of the earth.
verses.17: May his name endure forever; May his name produce descendants as long as the sun shines; And may people wish blessings on themselves by him; May all nations call him blessed.
verses.18: Blessed be the LORD God, the God of Israel, Who alone works wonders.
verses.19: And blessed be His glorious name forever; And may the whole earth be filled with His glory. Amen and Amen.
verses.20: The prayers of David the son of Jesse are ended.
